name: Homemade Teriyaki Marinade
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sake (or dry white wine or vodka)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 1 cup of brown sugar, 1 cup of soy sauce, and 1 cup of sake (or dry white wine or vodka).
2. Grate fresh ginger root and dice garlic cloves.
3. Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the marinade mixture.
4. Place thin cut steak strips or chicken parts (especially large quantities of wings) into the marinade and soak overnight.
5. For best results, grill on a BBQ, but baking at 350°F for one hour per pound is also an option.
Note: The only marinade that has effectively tenderized meat in my experience is this homemade Teriyaki recipe from a college roommate in Hawaii. I believe the high alcohol content contributes to its effectiveness.
